chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 309 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.02.2016 1. For Orders on MA 1838/16 2. For Orders on MA 176/15 3. For orders on MA 12893/15 4. For orders on MA 11560/15 5. For Orders on Office Objection 6. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. The petitioner claims to be owner of Barani land admeasuring 16-00 acres out of un-survey land of Deh Morho Jabal which, according to him, was granted to his father by then Deputy Commissioner, Dadu in open katcheri held on 21.6.1997. His case is that he has submitted an application for demarcation of the said land before the Mukhtiarkar (R) Kotri which is pending since 16.12.2014 and no action has been taken on it. His counsel states that if directions are issued to Mukhtiarkar to dispose of his application in accordance with law within a reasonable time, he would be satisfied and would not be pressing this petition. Learned A.A.G. has no objection to such proposal. Accordingly this petition is disposed of along with pending applications with directions to respondent No.4 / Mukhtiarkar Taluka Kotri to dispose of the application of the petitioner according to law as early as possible preferably within a period of two months on receipt of this order. JUDGE JUDGE *Karar/-
